---
title: "Biased by Design? Evaluating Bias and Behavioral Diversity in LLM Annotation of Real-World and Synthetic Hotel Reviews"
author: "Voutsa, M.C., Tsapatsoulis, N., and Djouvas, C."
date: 2025-01-01
description: "AI, 6(8), 178. doi: 10.3390/ai6080178"
categories: [Public Opinion and Argument Mining]
image: images_publications/journal-article.png
---
